name: 2pk Adhesive Dish and Hand Towel Push In Pull Out Holders - Brightroom™
description:
These 2-Pack Adhesive Dish and Hand Towel Push-In Pull-Out Holders from Brightroom™ offer a smart solution for managing both dish towels and hand towels. Made of ABS, this pack includes two black-and-gray holders provides with a unique push-in, pull-out mechanism that keeps towels securely in place while allowing easy access when needed. The efficient adhesive backing installs effortlessly inside cabinet doors or on walls without tools, making them perfect for kitchens and bathroom for streamlining your towel storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
